title: oxyacantha × media
intro: Oxyacantha × media, also known as hybrid hawthorn, is a cross between the white hawthorn (Crataegus monogyna) and the midland hawthorn (Crataegus laevigata), resulting in a unique combination of their characteristics. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to support cardiovascular health by helping to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The health benefits of Oxyacantha × media include reducing the risk of heart disease, improving circulation, and acting as a natural antioxidant. The herbal preparations of Oxyacantha × media include teas, capsules, and tinctures, often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
